name: The Haunted House : Dark Island
description: Your friends have vanished into the darkness… now, you are their only hope! Collect and grow your ghosts, and stand against powerful enemies.

name: Faultline.Exe
description: Halcyon Dynamics HR reminds you that mutating on company time is prohibited. Hack into a doomed space station via retro-terminal, outsmart a melting AI, and try to save the crew from rogue autodocs in cheesy FMV glory. 12 distinct endings.

name: BRAINBUGS: The Game
description: Promotional tie-in game for BRAINBUGS, the new feature film from CUTitPRINTit. Play as Teddy, pick up and deliver food in innovative "DoorDash" style gameplay! Discover first-hand why our unlikely protagonist is so depressed.

name: Hope Harrison
description: Hope Harrison takes a twist on the survival horror genre and remixes it with Hand Crafted RNG, Nightmarish Monsters and Permadeath. Can you find hope?

name: The Last Connection
description: You are a Switchboard Operator, and you're about to be replaced by a machine. Use your last week of work to connect townsfolk, overcome problems, and explore the history of a cast of engaging characters. Your choices matter, so use each day to leave lasting bonds.

name: Mawgate
description: Maria Moore is wrongfully imprisoned in the dreaded Mawgate Asylum. To survive she must do things she never thought herself capable of. Fight, hide, solve puzzles, and investigate the illusive dark forces behind the asylum. Maria must escape, or be consumed by the madness of Mawgate…

name: VertalStrike
description: A fast-paced multiplayer FPS built around momentum, readable firefights, and tight map control. Host rooms, fight online, or train with bots while you chase Battle Pass progress, quests, and loadout upgrades.

name: Fremd Wagen: Mod Chaos
description: Fremd Wagen: Modding Mayhem. The ultimate frustrating mathematical mod simulator. To stop the crashes, ensure your Mod Sum obeys the Rule of 42. Install the bypass fix, clean the DLLs, and solve the equation. Failure results in a 0xC0000005 crash!

name: Sanctum Ruins
description: A strategic roguelike deck-builder. Build your deck, master 8 unique classes, and conquer the Sanctum in quick sessions. Free to play.

name: Tokyo Trigger
description: Tokyo Trigger - Free Demo Tokyo 2050 glows with neon, but darkness hides beneath. Akihito, a warrior with a broken past, uncovers a plot threatening the city.Blast through a top-down cyberpunk world in this fast 2D shooter. Can you fight back against the oppression and reclaim your memories & honor?

name: Patent Tycoon
description: You are the 100th challenger. In a world marked by the legacy of 99 predecessors, wield patents as your weapon, build your company, and uncover the hidden truth. Fight through invention, patent filings, licensing, and litigation in this free-to-play business simulation with boss battles and a story.

name: The Immortal Is Watching
description: Players will take on the role of a little flower fairy and tap on wish plaques to send blessings. Each character’s story will unfold differently based on your choices. Once all wishes have been fulfilled, she will also experience different endings depending on your decisions.

name: We Are Prophet
description: We Are Prophet is a free fast-paced real time multiplayer game for two players. Ideal to have a quick tournament among friends, on gaming festivals or LANs.

name: Guild Manager 26
description: Collect over 1,300+ cards and build or draft a guild roster to compete in PvP/PvE leagues, tournaments, and dungeons! New updates weekly! No pay-to-win, no cash shop, and no subscription required!

name: Nepotism for Germany
description: Satirical political strategy: From local party to Orban's palace. Corruption has never been this much fun.

name: R.E.C
description: A Survival horror shooter blending first- and third-person combat. Engage in tactical firefights, manage scarce resources, and survive intense hybrid encounters as shifting perspectives and unique environments heighten tension and immersion.

name: 某一年四季
description: This is a short visual novel that blends atmospheric audio with radio drama.After this snowy night, through the seasons to come, she will sit by his bedside, telling him of her hopes and the stories that belong to them.

name: 封魔剑魂
description: 经典永不褪色，热血再度沸腾！《封魔剑魂》以原汁原味的传奇玩法为核心，打造高爆率、高自由度的MMORPG盛宴。在这里，装备全靠打，神装遍地爆，刀刀暴击、秒怪升级的极致爽感贯穿全程！与兄弟并肩征战，从新手小白到全服霸主，书写属于你的强者传奇！

name: 赤月传奇
description: 🎮 冰雪复古高爆版来袭！攻速拉满、刀刀烈火，打金就是这么畅快！1.76微变复古设定，完美还原经典玛法，又加入高爆率、快节奏的爽感体验。

name: 传奇盛世
description: 是一款复古的经典传奇游戏。 无首充！无套路! 无强制消费! 耐玩性佳：海量特色玩法持续更新，长久陪伴乐趣无穷！ 匠心巨制：团队潜心一年重磅打造，热血体验诚意奉上！ 人气保障：专注打造火爆大服，激情永不落幕！

name: Kill the Lich Idle
description: Kill the Lich is a minimalist incremental game about time compression and resource flow. Route your primary resource—Momentum—downstream to unlock over 300 actions. Design granular automation, visualize exposed formulas, and trigger deep prestige layers to ultimately defeat the Lich!

name: 【クラウドファンディング・ストレッチゴール特典ソフト】鉄道にっぽん！限定特別版 for ズイキマスコンPRO
description: このソフトは、株式会社瑞起にて行われた「ZUIKI MasConPRO （ズイキマスコンPRO）」のクラウドファンディングの達成記念として特別に公開されるソフトウェアです。

name: musi Utale
description: A top-down fighting game in a Toki-Pona-speaking world with directional-based mechanics. Challenge your friends to epic fights of unique mixups like no other fighting game has seen before in local or online play!

name: 8-hour Workday
description: 8-hour Workday is an anomaly search game inspired by Exit 8 and Platform 8. The player needs to explore a creepy, ominous office where dangerous anomalies are lurking around and try to make it through the work hours. There are 27 anomalies in the game. See if you can solve them all!

name: Glider Sim Lite – Soaring Simulator
description: The sky is yours. Fly hang gliders, paragliders, paramotors, speed-wings, and ultralight trikes across the entire globe - powered by real Google Earth terrain. Tune the weather, fly solo or with friends, and experience flight the way it actually feels.

name: Dead End Streets
description: WE ARE UNDERGOING REFORM! Following community feedback, the game is being remade from scratch in Unreal Engine to deliver the quality you deserve. The current version is a teaser of the progress.

name: Glassy Stare
description: A story-driven psychological experience where memory fades, silence deepens, and something waits in the dark.

name: VHSMan
description: "Alice decides to watch a VHS she found in the dumpster 6 months ago and crazy stuff happens!" A Visual Novel about a magical VHS tape

name: Hello my World! Lily.
description: "Hello my World! Lily." is a visual novel about a programmer who finds an unusual way to cope with loneliness and routine. But after a while, his imagination and actions go too far, and the line between reality and fantasy begins to melt rapidly.

name: MyMathHeroAdventure
description: This game contains a short story about knight vs wizard. The player will make the choice deciding what path the knight will take. During the journey, the game will include math puzzle for players to resolve. The math difficulty can be selected. There are also mode with math puzzle only.

name: Taina's Cursed Legacy
description: A text-based RPG with a nonlinear story set in a free Slavic fantasy world. Shape the heroine's character through your choices and unlock multiple endings. Mystery, folklore, and relationships — your fate depends only on you.

name: Thank You for Your Time
description: In a surreal audition purgatory, how long will you wait to be chosen?

name: SneakyDoggie
description: "Sneaky Doggie" is a dress-up game. You play as a loyal dog, creating a wide range of outfit combinations. Choose your favorite outfits, complete quests, and become a great doggie! ૮ ・ﻌ・ა Woof!

name: Crap Game, Don’t Play
description: This is a true piece of junk. Every second you spend opening this game is a waste of your precious time. Your time is valuable—open your eyes and stay away from trash games.

name: Onto Maizilind Unto Infinity
description: OMUI is a first-person narrative horror game set in an alternate reality 1970s Iran. A playful childhood afternoon in Tehran descends into the trauma of the Iranian Revolution, transforms into a nuclear apocalypse, and concludes with the suicide of my Uncle Ramin.

name: FALL
description: "FALL" is a small-scale visual novel game. Players will take on the role of "Lane", a girl in Celeste. After encountering members of a mysterious organization , she will go to investigate a series of mysterious events. Depending on the player's choice, the game will lead to two different endings.

name: Tricks, Treats and Mirrors - An EoG Side Story
description: "Trick-or-Treat" doesn't always get you a treat.

name: Novaxandria Volume 01
description: This game is a combination of a visual novel and a 2D turn-based strategy game. It marks the first volume in the Novaxandria series. Join young Iris, our main protagonist, as she develops friendship with a group of other kids, and fights against the injustice that’s happening in their orphanage.

name: SKATR
description: SKATR is an inline skating game where you skate fast and do cool tricks. Do advanced tricks for more points and maintain max speed! It's also just fun 2 skate around.

name: Karless
description: A factory automation game where you build vehicle production lines to reconnect a shattered post-apocalyptic continent. Mine raw resources, research new technologies, and build vehicle supply chains — ship them out to reconnect the severed regions of Aris.

name: Neat Particles
description: Neat particles is a small particle simulation toy in which you explore and play around with randomly generated interesting/weird/preety particle behaviors and patterns. (Does not use AI or machine learning of any kind)

name: Witness To Mass Incarceration
description: Witness to Mass Incarceration is a narrative-driven interactive story based on my life in federal prison. It is a brutally honest portrayal of the lack of humanity, how our lives inside are at risk every day, and the place you are forced to go within yourself to survive.

name: Shadows of the Ruins
description: Venture yourself into the ancient Ruins of a fallen evil empire in order to loot treasures and save your village from eternal poverty. But behold, there is MORE than traps and MONSTERS waiting for you in this dungeon...

name: Call of Girls
description: Call of Girls is a fantasy RPG centered around "character collection + idle gameplay + strategic combat," emphasizing high-quality art and a relaxed, long-term play experience. The game features a unique storyline for each character, enhancing the collection and immersive experience.

name: Alphabetical Order
description: Experience an exciting journey in a surreal world, fight for your name, your social status and to survive. Leave the arena as a winner, with money, a lot of loot and hopefully a good speedrun time. Retry to improve, test different weapons, loadouts and skillsets.

name: Neon Marble Rust
description: Build bases, manage resources, scout, strategize, tech-up, produce and control hordes of arena-bots. Neon, Marble, and Rust are the 3 factions, each has a unique economy and roster. Play online or choose from a variety of single-player modes. Classic-style RTS before a stadium crowd.

name: Somnium
description: “Somnium” is a TPS action RPG where you defeat enemies and advance by defeating bosses in each stage with your sword. Navigate boss rush-style dungeons while strengthening your character, aiming to clear stages through dodging, guarding, just guarding, and jumping.

name: Sotidrokhima 2: Against Eternity
description: In this epic and bloody representative of the ''bullet heaven'' genre, the Finnish hero Sotidrokhima must conquer the afterlife by slaying thousands of enemies alongside his fellow fallen warriors - and ultimately confronting the ruler of the Underworld, Son of Tuoni.

name: Dreams Far Away
description: This game offers a first-person platforming experience for up to 8 players. After a mutated rabies virus began to threaten life on Earth, humanity found refuge in safe cities built in the sky. Overcome obstacles to reach the safe city — and be the first to get there.

name: R.A.T#200
description: A stealth-based survival thriller where you play as an experimental rat trapped in a laboratory. Hide, observe, and use the environment to escape without being detected.

name: 附中學院79校慶
description: "HSNU Academy 79th Anniversary" is a dark, narrative puzzle game set at HSNU. Explore the campus via chat to uncover secrets and reach multiple endings. This 1-hour experience unlocks Free Mode upon completion. Stay tuned for new games in future celebrations!

name: The Moon Looks Beautiful Tonight: Definitive Edition
description: Two girls must travel to the Moon's core after it has been thrown out of orbit. A PC98 inspired visual novel about fear of the unknown and people in love.

name: トー京Xtrip
description: 架空の都市「トー京」を舞台に、“界隈”と呼ばれる若者たちと出会い共に過ごすなかで不可解な出来事に巻き込まれていく、ストーリー重視のSF青春アドベンチャーゲーム

name: 回忆忘却之看板娘
description: This short story commemorates the first anniversary(2016) of the CnGal. It's a heartwarming, healing tale filled with references to our mascot's daily life and Chinese galgame jokes. We hope you enjoy it—and fall in love with our mascot!

name: 迷鹿：Terreno di caccia
description: 独居在求学之地、平平无奇的草食妖怪少女——小璐茸的生活在新学期开头便陷入了异常…… 安谧而愉快的平凡日常被打破，而通过选择指引到的未来能否让她摆脱不安的阴影？ 红线那一端所牵引的人，是未来的幸福，还是蓄势的猎手？

name: Dark Lord Verkins
description: Queen Verkins is the dragon queen and one of the three rulers of the underworld. Queen Galzra is the grim reaper queen and also is a ruler. Explore the story and lore about Verkins, ruler of dragons. This is a romantic love story between these two in this short romance visual novel.

name: 让我支配你
description: 这是一部以“女性支配”为主题的短篇视觉小说。你首次登录这款游戏，发现自己竟是被班上校霸的早古女主，于是你放飞自我，拳打霸凌咔校霸（纪文川），脚踢不听话跟踪狂学生会长（林子莫），故事由此展开……（内涵囚禁、暴力、公调等元素）

name: A Father's Growth Spurt
description: Juggle the tasks of taking care of a bonsai by monitoring the water, fertilizer, and weeds in the same pot, all while witnessing the short linear narrative between the 3 generations of the same family.

name: リベンジ・ハート
description: 「４日後に、俺の心臓を撃ちぬいて殺して欲しい」 リベンジ・ハートはワガママな殺し屋ケヴィンと、心臓を狙われた少年ルカが繰り広げる一本道ノベルADVです。 ――引き金が引かれるその時まで。復讐を願う少年とそれに加担した殺し屋の４日間が始まる。

name: 女皇请调教男宠-策略.卡牌.养成.游戏
description: From princess to queen, facing numerous calculations, taking every step carefully in love, encountering hundreds of characters with different personalities one after another, including arrogant young man, gentle childhood sweetheart, mysterious boy, black-bellied fox

name: 아테네 학원 ~사랑과 진리의 변증법적 검증~
description: The world is in a Great Age of Academia, with philosophy in particular garnering immense attention. This is the visual novel, Academy of Athens, a philosophical brain battle. What exactly happens at the Academy of Athens, a gathering place for geniuses...?

name: 手撕道祖，脚踩大乘（Tao Ancestor's Vanquisher）
description: A story-rich single-player AVG RPG. Features a 2-hour main storyline with multiple branching narratives, encompassing political intrigue, demon clan wars, and emotional entanglements. confront the apocalyptic crisis of the demon clan's resurgence.

name: Pippa and Your Phantasmal Problem
description: Find out who's been messing up your home with this troublesome witch!

name: 重返1941—剧版玉梦cp同人衍生
description: 一款由 RPG Maker MZ 制作的轻小说解谜游戏。玩家将在裘庄等场景中搜集线索、推理真相，体验紧张而悬疑的剧情故事。

name: Обо: Шоу Теней
description: Байкал зовёт. Прошлое возвращается в форме теней, и Андрей должен решить - играть по чужим правилам или переписать сценарий судьбы.

name: PolyLumina
description: A colorful rhythm simulation game where you compose polyrhythmic chord progressions and watch them come alive through glowing, reactive visuals.

name: Not For You
description: Narrative experience from the mind of Thomas Hunt. Skateboarding Cows? Sentient boxes? A deep, emotional melodrama about the video games industry? Yep, it's got it all!  NOT FOR YOU is a collection of short experiences, which you can play in any order you would like!

name: Предновогодняя сказка
description: A Drow named Violet teleports to our world to find the missing piece of the family pendant. The predominant genre of the game is a romantic comedy with elements of a visual novel, and a movement system from classic JRPGs.

name: Lost in the Woods
description: 'One last try' Violet is determined to save her broken marriage - at any cost!Wandering through a dark forest in search of lost mementos, she finds the world around her shifting with every step.

name: 我非圣贤 / 我非聖賢
description: Players will experience intertwined storylines of the male protagonist and three female leads. The male lead features in about half of the narrative, which is told mostly from his perspective. Through the story progression, players will witness a dramatic tale of power, emotion, and destiny.

name: I Will Never Fall For My Tsundere Classmate, So I Will Just Date A Background Character Instead!
description: A short parody visual novel about romance with a tsundere girl... Or not?

name: Kino
description: Odesa, 1929. A woman wakes up. This will be her last morning. An all-powerful film camera forces her to watch her life again. Can she find what was missing? A very short choose-your-own-adventure based on Dziga Vertov's Man with a Movie Camera.

name: Zerowake GATES
description: Enter a battlefield where madness and desire collide. Pair Espers and Guides for powerful synergy, and join Han Gaon as he uncovers the meteor’s secret and fights to survive a world under alien invasion.

name: Kill the Demon Lord
description: Instead of waiting at the end of your adventure, the Demon Lord decided to fight you right at the very beginning. Not very sporting of her... Pretty sure she broke a few rules. She can’t keep this up forever. Kill the anomaly.

name: Set Adrift
description: Set Adrift is a single-player fantasy exploration game where you sail between strange islands, talk to odd creatures, uncover lost secrets, and cast your line in search of the unknown.

name: Billie Beetleneck -A detective tale-
description: Every story ever written has an alternate world that coexists with ours. When a large number of parallel universes are suddenly destroyed, Billie Beetleneck sets off on his hardest case yet in this interactive visual novel.

name: Girls' Frontline
description: As a Commander for Griffin & Kryuger PMC. Navigate faction power struggles, deploy forces strategically, and work to restore order in a war-torn world.

name: Stay Alive For Me
description: Survive a gripping psychological thriller in this visual novel. Make critical decisions, face a disturbed captor, and experience multiple chilling endings.

name: Prometheus in a jar
description: Take a look—watch how the “me” in the game is shaped by your choices, pushing the story forward step by step until the truth of this game (this world) is finally revealed.

name: イツワリの令嬢少年
description: A boy living as a warrant for a political marriage falls in love with a maid despite his unrequited love. You become a black rose fairy who grants wishes and discover that you were once human. Enter the bodies of the people in the mansion and trace their memories to discover their true identities.

name: Trail of Stars
description: A short and (bitter)sweet fairy tale visual novel about first love and longing.

name: Before I Come In
description: A visual novel/block-breaker hybrid. Make choices that shape the story and stats, which affect your projectile strength in the block-breaking mini-game. Follow a young man's journey of growth and sexual self-discovery. 2-4 hours of playtime.

name: Tiny Shadows Interwoven Hearts
description: Programmer Lin Mo is tired of his monotonous life. One day, he meets a mysterious girl at a café who hides many secrets. As lies and true feelings intertwine, can this chance encounter save him from his numb existence? A visual novel filled with "love and hope".

name: 세이프타운 탐정 넬의 사건 수첩 오션 아일랜드의 살인사건
description: “Use your intellect and intuition to uncover the secrets tangled like a maze!”

name: ARIA-404: Labyrinth Protocol
description: A cyber‑mythic interactive narrative game blending quick‑time events with rich narrative-driven gameplay, & AI‑generated worlds. Shape the evolving Labyrinth & uncover its secrets in this solo‑developed revolution in interactive storytelling.

name: 氷点下30度の絶望
description: 可愛い後輩と2人っきり……冷凍庫の中で。 低体温症、矛盾脱衣、幻覚などの苦痛を乗り越えた先にあるのは、「真相」と「死」のみ。

name: 怪異ジャッジ・ドリーミー
description: とびきりファンシーな怪異調査ノベルゲーム短編集！ メカクレ青年ハマメが、夢のような不思議な世界へ！

name: コ、今に在り - Ko ima ni ari
description: Ko ima ni ari is an interactive story-driven game about the past, present and future of someone loosing slowly their sight.

name: Monster Girl Manor
description: Welcome to the MONSTER GIRL MANOR! Tour around to find your way to meet the characters created by Dream Audio VA, Lacey Audayo, Method Switch, Startlit Audios and Xena Alexander. Find out which girls are your vibe and find out more of their lore!

name: 永不停息的黑暗之歌 ~ Endless Black Song
description: This is a fan-made game for "Alien Stage," created as a tribute to the world of "The Song of Saya." It is a coupling-focused game centered on the "IvanTill" pairing.

name: I Wanna Play That Picture Puzzle with Numbers All Day!
description: I want to play that puzzle—where you look at the numbers on the left and top and fill in the intersecting squares—forever! In a rainy café, you can quietly and endlessly immerse yourself in solving puzzles.

name: ステータス確認探偵
description: Check the suspect's status and solve the mystery! A status-checking mystery ADV in which a rookie detective takes on difficult cases that take place in a fantasy world.

name: Umbral Crown: Mark
description: Leviathan receives an order from the Fortress: infiltrate Pandemonium and eliminate Wrath, the ruthless traitor. Prove yourself, sea dragon. (Short adventure RPG / visual novel)

name: BA: The City Within
description: Experience a devastated Seoul, locked down after war and biochemical attacks. Craft cocktails from discarded food and alcohol to serve guests, earning their trust to uncover hidden stories. Explore abandoned subway lines modeled on the real Seoul system in this story-driven puzzle adventure.

name: Fading Lights
description: A first person detective game inspired by return of obra dinn where you have to interact with various items inside a house and unlock old memories to rebuild your Family Tree.

name: Casey Noir and Carved Pumpkin's Latte
description: What's this? A Point and Click, "Who Done It?", Murder Mystery Visual Novel, set in a Gothic Hotel on top of a lonely hill, during the Night of Halloween?

name: My Silly Science Summer in the Past
description: A visual novel for girls: Experience a fun time travel adventure and make friends with some quirky girls at a science camp. Will you solve the mysteries and find your way back to your time? Your choices make your own story! Full with challenging puzzle games, and unique endings.

name: Prosrochennyy
description: A visual novel game about dissociation, eating disorders and abandonment. You experience life through fragmented thoughts, simulating the inner voice of someone disconnected from reality. A text-based story of presence and absence.

name: • Dread Chess ✣
description: ✣ Dread Chess is an original and strange narrative story-puzzle game with sandbox elements. Uncover mysteries by speaking with gods in Latin. Immerse yourself in an atmosphere of madness, and reach one of many endings in an unfair game against Death that can be played ONLY ONCE...

name: Dawn After Dusk
description: Asylum simulator. An interactive fiction about schizophrenia and finding meaning after near-death, with Disco Elysium-style mechanics.

name: Dancing with Shadows: Prologue
description: Dancing with Shadows: Prologue is a 2D dark fantasy visual novel with CYOA-influenced branching storylines. Guide three protagonists through an interlocked and inexorably connected storyline. There are no wrong answers, but your decisions have consequences.

name: this game will end in 205 clicks.
description: What does a SUPERVILLAIN do, when he is forbidden from doing anything evil for the day? WARNING: This is not the type of game where you can make meaningful choices.

name: SCP: Yet Another Day
description: SCP: Yet Another Day is a mess of genres RPG where a dysfunctional friend group must get it together to escape a monster filled facility and survive a psychopathic terrorist, expect madness

name: Parallel Convergence
description: A time travel project. A group of students. A cat that eats too much. Can you rewrite fate without losing what matters most?

name: Life of a Dispatch English Teacher in Japan
description: A visual novel about living through a sudden and chaotic job loss, and making tough choices about your future. Based on the real-life experiences of foreign teachers living in Japan.

name: Playing With The Big Boys
description: Survive the streets, outsmart the gangs, and uncover what freedom really means in this dark narrative adventure.

name: Don't Let Me Fade
description: Don't Let Me Fade is an interactive adventure about memory, identity, and loss. Piece together fragments of a life - even if a simple teddy bear is the last symbol of connection to oneself in a world without time.

name: Lake of Darkness
description: Your small town is slowly becoming corrupted by a mysterious evil, In a dream you get a premonition of your own death. How do you avoid an unknown fate? Spend your final moments wisely in this choice-based psychological horror visual novel game.

name: Adult Life Yuri Bundle by Team ANPIM
description: Collection of 4 yuri stories by Team ANPIM, featuring women who are 23 years and older! No longer students, they are finding romance while balancing the responsibilities of working, rent, and adulting.

name: vivid/stasis
description: Rhythm-mystery hybrid game about uncovering the history of a mysterious system. The stage is set. Will you step up and play your role?

name: Побег в Москву 2
description: This is a visual novel - a continuation of the game Escape to Moscow. More than 3 hours of gameplay, 6 game days. Immerse yourself in new adventures in Moscow and other locations. You need to help Aliya escape to freedom again! The plot of the game depends on the decisions you make.

name: Dice Eater: A Supernatural Mystery Card Game
description: Dice Eater is a mystery card game based around supernatural powers where players must use their power to uncover the other player's tricks. Use your opponent's tricks against them to turn the tables and win.

name: Sounds of Her Love 2
description: A cute romance visual novel set at an international school in Japan. As you approach the final hours of your school years together, help your sweet but shy girlfriend Ceri overcome her fears to be able to play the harp at the school's graduation ceremony. A tender, wholesome love story awaits.

name: Whispers of the village
description: You arrive in a small village as a fortune-teller who reads the future in tea leaves. But an apocalyptic vision leads you to question its tranquillity. What if you had a part to play in this? Ready your cups and tea leaves, as the future of this village will be shaped by four unusual visitors.

name: They Came for More Pasta
description: "When aliens order pasta, only one guy can deliver justice!" You're a food delivery guy in this short, comical graphic adventure, determined to stop the monopoly on Italian cousine imposed by an alien invasion.

name: The Dark Quarter
description: A companion app necessary for playing the The Dark Quarter board game from Lucky Duck Games. The Dark Quarter is a cooperative adventure game that tells a rich, adult, dynamic story, mixing an app with physical components.

name: Narb Fortunii
description: Narb Fortunii is a short, story driven adventure. Move through the environment and read the characters dialogue while you enjoy the music. Complete a platforming challenge to reach the final conversation of this whimsical adventure.

name: 17 ways to not die (or not, IDK) - Interactive Movie
description: 17 Ways Not to Die is a movie, first and foremost. A movie in which you can influence what happens on the screen. There are 17 endings, or not endings, or not 17, I don’t know. I don’t care.

name: Dreamland
description: A group of young people decides to find out why they are seeing mysterious symbols. As they unravel the mystery, they travel through other worlds that are indistinguishable from those seen in dreams. One can only hope that this will not turn into a nightmare for them...

name: Mandatory Fun
description: You play as a young man conscripted into the Finnish military. Your actions shape how things turn out — for you, and for those around you. This is a story-rich experience with elements of drama, comedy, and romance… if you can call it that.

name: Future Cowboy
description: A single-player narrative game where you play as a quirky wannabe cowboy exploring the dystopian futuristic world for his own revenge.

name: The Tavern In the Woods
description: "Tavern in the Woods" is a first person, single-player interactive fiction story that blends mystery, storytelling, and supernatural horror. Players explore and investigate an isolated environment as the narrative slowly unfolds, gradually uncovering the truth behind the eerie emptiness.

name: My life with you
description: "My Life with You" is a STORY DRIVEN experience that follows the journey of a young SINGLE MOM who must BALANCE life's challenges while raising her child. An emotional journey focused on the BOND BETWEEN MOTHER AND CHILD, marked by obstacles, growth, and love.

name: The Communist Manifesto ~ A Visual Novel
description: The visual novel adaptation of The Communist Manifesto by Karl Marx and Friedrich Engels. Experience the Manifesto in a conversational style for the first time and fully customize your reading.

name: Good Lord! Everyone at the Reunion For My Religious All-Girls School Is a Trans Man... And They're Hot?!
description: Are you really the only woman at the ten year reunion for your religious all-girls high school?! Catch up with your old graduating class and maybe learn a thing or two about yourself in a hilarious weekend romp at a posh vineyard. What could possibly go wrong?

name: One's Own Exile
description: Follow Sybil in her pursuit for survival, having to sacrifice everything - her culture, her identity, her values - to achieve a single objective: escape from a place that is constantly trying to kill her. A short game about persecution and identity.

name: CATpillAr
description: “CATpillAr” is a horror-themed VR mini-game that requires you to collect big, juicy, hairy, creepy caterpillars crawling around an empty hospital. In VR, you can grab harmless giant caterpillars by the neck and throw them inside the bucket. Replay and see how many you can collect!

name: 夢の終わり - Upon the Dream's End -
description: What did the girl encounter? A cinematic novel game with film-inspired storytelling.

name: DUET
description: DUET illustrates the Hifuu Club's first encounter. It is a wordless, narrative-driven experience about connection and small moments in life. Step into the subtle yet fateful daily interactions that intertwine Renko and Merry's lives.

name: Maline
description: A visual novel about a devil girl's interdimension-Hell journey in the name of Kindness... Do you believe?

name: The Ghost of Alcantra
description: The Ghost of Alcantra is a free kinetic romance/mystery vn that alternates between two perspectives, one focusing on a blossoming romantic relationship, and another focused on unraveling a murder mystery.

name: Incelthread
description: A visual novel about a bunny girl, her boyfriend and a rabbit named Tonya

name: Late Night Mystery
description: A terrifying story that immerses you in a dark world full of horrific surprises that will leave the player frozen in fear.

name: When the Crow Sings
description: WHEN THE CROW SINGS is an adventure mystery game with a focus on exploration, characters, and world building, featuring a cast of diverse survivors trying to keep the status quo as their compound life grows more complicated and dangerous.

name: Doug The Digger
description: Doug The Digger is a casual, single-player mining and crafting game where you aim to escape a crash landing by crafting a rocket. The gameplay is simple but addictive—play at your own risk!

name: AI T/F Escape: 10 in a Row to Freedom
description: You're trapped in a mysterious room. To escape, challenge yourself with a True/False question created by AI.

name: Tattoos and Tulips
description: Follow Chrys as he declares to swear off dating in favor of focusing on himself and hanging out with friends. That is until a very sweet, and very hot tattoo artist named Shay enters the picture. Has Chrys' bad luck gone away?

name: Fire from the sky: Cagliari 1943 VR
description: Fire from the Sky: Cagliari 1943 VR is an immersive experience that transports you to the dramatic days of the Allied bombings over Cagliari during World War II.

name: Spider Land
description: There's a spider haunting these hills.

name: Kollywood: The Game
description: Kollywood: The Game is a stop motion video, comedy game with quick-time event fight scenes inspired by Tamil Cinema.

name: Tales of Maana: Lucy
description: Dive into an enchanting world where every decision matters—alliances, betrayals, romance, and power struggles shape a story as deep as it is unforgettable.

name: Plenty of Fish in the Sea
description: Plenty of Fish in the Sea is a cozy narrative-driven dating sim where you engage in heartfelt conversations with charming salmon and take them on delightful underwater dates.

name: Dere Quartet
description: A funny story about four cute girls. Join their class and have a good time with this relaxing game!

name: The Balldragon
description: A short parody of everybody's favorite japanese cartoon.

name: In The Foundations
description: A horror visual novel about coming back to your childhood home.

name: I'm Pregnant at 16
description: "I'm Pregnant at 16" is a visual novel about tough choices, growing up, and navigating relationships during an unexpected pregnancy. Personal stories and the consequences of decisions are balanced with awkward moments, chat messages, inner thoughts, and memes.

name: Vollema
description: Vollema is a hand-drawn, color-changing RPG featuring a unique pattern memorization-based combat system where you and your classmates uncover a sinister plot involving your school, local politics, and a cult-like paramilitary organization.

name: Dice Making Ending
description: Does rolling the dice determine a person's ending?At every crossroad, we've all wondered about this at least once.Enjoy a casual game where you roll the dice and watch endings unfold.You can play various endings in just a short amount of time.

name: Absolution
description: Absolution is a first-person psychological horror experience where you face THE JUDGE as they peel apart your very soul. Uncover dark truths and navigate moral dilemmas as you're questioned about your past deeds. Every lie has consequences.

name: Leucanthemum Eyes
description: On a rainy day, Daisy decides to wait out the rain inside a tunnel. Suddenly, she found herself in a metallic, dirty and dark place, full of ghosts and a beautiful female entity. Your objective now is to find a way out of that infernal sewer as quickly as possible.

name: Stella: into the Shadow
description: "Stella: into the Shadow" is a dark mystical story. When Stella's friend disappears, her life transforms into a detective mystery. Working at a nightclub, forging new connections, and uncovering the city's secrets will force her to reevaluate everything: from those around her to her very self.

name: qualia
description: Intellica thanks you for volunteering in this short text-based Research Study. Pay attention to the participants answers, and classify them as either Human or Artificial. Join us in shaping the future of technology. Remember, think happy!

name: Across Icaria
description: A boy called Ica decide to visit sea.

name: Pawns of War
description: Dark parallel world in which humanity has destroyed itself. And only small colonies have survived the last centuries holding on to power at the expense of the totalitarian regime of government. You were thrown here after your death, is this how you were given a second chance?

name: OmOneko
description: “A story about cat girls … with bite.” Nekos have evolved in the shadows of human society. Beautiful. Mysterious. Chaotic. And now, three of them live with you. Will you be able to get past the stigma and grow closer to them? OmOneko is a tale of cat and mouse... and rats.

name: NOX AETERNA - Veil of Darkness
description: He’s been searching for his missing friend for days. She’s been searching for her long-lost clan member for decades. Now their paths cross.

name: Saihate Station
description: An exploration/horror/adventure game about the codependent, love-hate relationship between two men.

name: Steel Century Groove: Midnight
description: Pilot mecha in rhythm-RPG dance battles in this free standalone adventure from the world of Steel Century Groove. Assemble a squad of colossal dancers and groove your way through a neon city where it's always night.

name: Parasite in Love
description: Infected with the parasite commonly known as the “brain eating amoeba”, you have 10 days left before your death. One of the symptoms is hallucinations. And through that, “he” starts to talk and confesses his love to you. Can you convince the parasite to leave your body before it’s too late?

name: Túatha Echoes: The Village
description: Immerse yourself in the psychological horror of The Village, where whispers bend reality and ordinary life spirals into madness. Unravel the dark rise of one of Túatha's most infamous figures in this short story visual novel.

name: What happened on the Moon?
description: Built by Professor Ward, you are an autonomous Moon Rover on a mission to investigate mysterious activity on the lunar surface...

name: Sentou Gakuen: Revival
description: You are one of the students of Sentou Gakuen, a random school in Japan, filled with delinquents, rascals, and of course some good students. How will you spend your days in Sentou Gakuen? Forge your own path in this online interactive Visual Novel, make friends or foes, the choice is yours.

name: The Beautiful Island
description: A short visual novel about war, peace and hope. Explore a city after a devastating war. Talk to people, try to understand, try to help. The heroes of war are dead, but you can be a hero of peace!

name: Century of Anticipation
description: Locked away at home, time slows to a crawl. Enjoy our gift to you, this delightful adventure with an unforgettable soundtrack by Brazilian artists.

name: DUNGEON OF LOVE: Catch Monsters
description: Capture monsters, discover their human form, and fall in love with a unique cast of girls while exploring dangerous dungeons. Love has never been this adventurous!

name: Epimutation
description: 399 days ago, the world ended. Epimutation is a horror visual novel that follows seven survivors as they attempt to navigate life in the apocalypse. Make life or death decisions, form bonds with your fellow survivors, and attempt to unravel the mystery behind the outbreak.

name: R/A\W
description: Anthology of anti-war stories by award-winning authors from Russia

name: The Nutcracker of Riepass (Nymph's Tale ep 2)
description: A fantasy comedy hybrid visual novel with jrpg battles

name: Kingdom of Piss
description: Join two punk-rock royal heirs, Pretty Piss Princess and Asian American, as they dodge their royal duties in favor of adventures. This hilarious visual novel, inspired by TROMA films, follows the duo as they navigate the absurdities of royal life, and embrace their rebellious spirit.

name: YAMIKKO TROUBLEMAKER
description: A long-form, choice-driven psychological horror and depression game in which the protagonist’s ending changes based on the choices made by “you,” the voice he hears in his head.

name: The Seabed's Shining Star
description: Under the hazy moon, a shrine maiden meets a star. A short visual novel of a two person conversation. Cup ramen recommended.

name: Assetflip attorney
description: Assetflip attorney is a murder mystery satire visual novel, Solve crimes in a world where everyone has gone insane and everything feels like a fever dream, interrogate witnesses, hunt for clues and take down the criminal organization that threatens to destroy reality

name: of the Devil
description: Immerse yourself in neon, smoke, and high-stakes legal gambles as a Defense Attorney with uniquely Killer insights in this episodic, diabolically stylish visual novel adventure game.

name: The Dispatcher
description: Step into the role of Dominic, a dispatcher in Heavenbrook, where your choices shape a gripping visual novel and adventure game filled with suspense, mystery, and dark secrets. Unravel the chilling mysteries as the shocking events in the city unfold before you.

name: Atropos
description: "Atropos" is a visual novel in which you will learn about the story of Atropos, the prince of Capernaum.

name: Whisperstring
description: Whisperstring is an 80s inspired text adventure game that takes place inside a “chat room”. You’re connected to Adam, a "jock" with a severe fear of strings, who seems to have been the victim of a supernatural kidnapping. Will you be able to help him escape?

name: Drinking in the hot spring!
description: "How about a drink?" In this heartwarming, conversation-driven visual novel, you step into the role of the leader of a hot spring drinking club. You'll help its colorful members navigate personal troubles, sometimes with the aid of a drink or two, and see their challenges through to resolution.

name: Lanesplitterz
description: Lanesplitterz is a 3D arcade-style bowling game. Join Hiro as he competes in a brutal bowling tournament to become King of Neo Las Vegas!

name: Snowkissed Romance
description: It's 1994 in the mountains of Northern Japan - Are you ready to fall in love? Snowkissed Romance weaves addictive stat-building, day planning, and mini-games with captivating storytelling and plenty of ’90s shoujo charm.

name: Black Market
description: Black Market is an item shop simulator where you are a shopkeeper that pawns items and strikes deals with your villainous customers in order to make rent. It’s a cutthroat world out there.
